projectDescription: Real-time debate fact-checking with live transcription, claim extraction, and verification against primary sources.
keyFeatures: Real-time audio transcription with speaker diarization using Deepgram nova-3
Context-aware claim extraction with Gemini 2.0 Flash multi-turn sessions
Automated fact-checking via Perplexity Sonar with source citations
Live reactive updates using Convex subscriptions with no polling
Multi-turn extraction sessions to prevent duplicate claims and maintain context
Functional error handling with Effect library for retries and timeouts
GitHub OAuth authentication via Convex Auth
publicApiSurface: debates.create - Create a new debate session
debates.end - End an active debate and trigger final claim extraction
debates.get - Retrieve a specific debate by ID
debates.list - List all debates for the authenticated user
claims.listByDebate - Get all claims for a specific debate
transcriptChunks.save - Save transcription chunks from Deepgram
transcriptChunks.listByDebate - Retrieve transcript chunks for a debate
deepgramToken.generate - Generate temporary Deepgram API token
claimExtraction.extract - Extract claims from unprocessed transcript chunks
factCheck.check - Verify a claim using Perplexity Sonar
